spoke_result.arabic_caption: سرعة بلا ضجيج. فخامة بلا تعقيد. الموديل S: المستقبل من الداخل.
spoke_result.english_caption: Speed without sound. Luxury without limits. Model S: the future, redefined.
spoke_result.notes: Combined Tesla's signature sleekness with high-impact contrasts (speed/silence, luxury/limits) to emphasize performance and refinement. Arabic version tailored to luxury perception in Gulf market. Hashtags blend trending regional EV interest and global prestige. Strong hook due to concise duality and aspirational tone.
